product_results.title: TOCOL 2 Pack for iPhone 16 Pro Max/iPhone 16 Pro Camera Lens Protectors, Individual Tempered Glass Protectors, Anti-Scratch, Easy Installation, Ultra HD Night Shooting Mode, Black

authors_reviews.title: Satisfied
authors_reviews.text: Came as advertised, very easy to follow directions and install on phone! Satisfied customer!
authors_reviews.author: Doug H

authors_reviews.title: Easy install
authors_reviews.text: Similar to their screen protector, this is foolproof to install. Virtually invisible.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Excellent screen protector for iphone 12 pro!!
authors_reviews.text: It was my first time buying screen protector online. But I was amazed by the screen protector package the moment I opened it! The package contains 2 front screen protectors, and 2 camera protectors which a lot of sellers do not offer! In addition, it also has cleaning cloth, cleaning stickers and a firm phone case, which helps users to stick the glass protector to the screen (Believe it or not, you can even use it as a phone case if you want!). And everything is more than 1 piece. So you never need to worry that you run out of it in a short time.Another big plus is that the package contains a link, which leads you to installation videos that teach you how to install the screen protector. Thanks to the video, everything becomes straightforward. I am very glad that I was able to remove all the bubbles by myself just by watching the video!Overall, it was a pleasant purchase and the product is great in value!!! I highly recommend this screen protector package to anyone who has an iphone 12 or iphone 12 pro!! You can't find any better choice than this one, given the price!
authors_reviews.author: Winsy

authors_reviews.title: One downside
authors_reviews.text: Easy to install, tools are awesome and make the job easy. Only one thing i didnt like is, i can see tiny dots like pixels which is ridiculus for a screen protector on a phone which we pay premium for good screen. Maybe its there due to the anti spy glass but if i had known first, i would not have bought the glass in the first place.
authors_reviews.author: Pramod Ghimire

authors_reviews.title: Easy installation, good quality and value for money
authors_reviews.text: Very satisfy with the purchase. The instruction is very clear and once you follow the installation video, it is very easy to install. I got this new phone therefore I am extra nervous of it. The quality of the protection screen and the camera lenses protection seems very good in terms of the price and I think it is in good value. They comes with 2 sets of screen and camera lens protector. The camera lenses protection are amazing which protect the lens from scratch. Definitely recommend
authors_reviews.author: Karen
